item.title: They believe in it distorted form of Christianity that values the American empire well above it valuing whatever values Christia...
item.description:
They believe in it distorted form of Christianity that values the American empire well above it valuing whatever values Christianity originally had and certainly the values of life of Christians

item.title: They believe in their distorted form of Christianity which place is whiteness and Americanness and the American empire much abov...
item.description:
They believe in their distorted form of Christianity which place is whiteness and Americanness and the American empire much above any of the implicit or explicit teachings of Christian

item.title: You are a bad politician if you are this disalignment with your base, but that is because your base is the same corporate Democr...
item.description:
You are a bad politician if you are this disalignment with your base, but that is because your base is the same corporate Democrats that I’ve been losing every election of the past 10 years#greenscreenvideo

item.title: It all seems a little random seeing people like this stand so clearly for people that are extremely racist towards them but we h...
item.description:
It all seems a little random seeing people like this stand so clearly for people that are extremely racist towards them but we have to understand that colonialism predates that particular form of that colonies ideology, and it will choose its own power over its own ideology
